Term Sheet – Proposed Strategic Subscription (Singapore law; non-binding save for specified clauses)
Parties: Aurora Grid Limited (SGX-ST Mainboard issuer; registered office: 8 Cobalt Tower #20-01, Singapore 049999) and Orchid Reef Pte. Ltd. (registered office: 77 Compass Lane #03-12, Singapore 550777)
Transaction: Subject to approvals, Orchid Reef Pte. Ltd. proposes to subscribe for up to 15% new ordinary shares in Aurora Grid Limited by way of a private placement; this proposal has not been announced and is contingent on SGX-ST Listing Manual compliance and board approvals
Instrument and pricing: New ordinary shares issued under the general mandate; pricing to fall within permissible discount limits under SGX-ST Listing Manual; security code/ISIN: XX0000000000 (placeholder only)
Use of proceeds: General corporate purposes including supply chain electrification consistent with Aurora Grid’s publicly announced 2023 climate transition plan and existing sustainability targets; no new ESG commitments are made in this term sheet
Due diligence: Limited-scope legal/financial diligence relying primarily on publicly available information; cyber review comprises tabletop verification of policies only and excludes any investigation of incidents unless already disclosed in annual reports
Information barriers and insider list: Each party will maintain internal information-barrier procedures and may circulate a training-only “insider-list template” with no names or contact details; no insider names are to be exchanged under this term sheet
Blackout and anti-tipping: References to blackout periods and anti-tipping obligations are for policy education only; deal parties will follow the issuer’s existing securities trading policy without creating any new blackout windows by this document
Crypto references: Any mention of “Aurora Wallet” or “token” in marketing materials is strictly product naming for a customer education demo and does not involve digital payment token services, custody, or MAS licensing reliance
Conditions precedent: Board approvals, SGX-ST clearance where applicable, and shareholder approval if required by the Listing Manual; MAS notifications/consents only if any existing undertakings require them; no mandatory general offer is contemplated by this term sheet
Announcements and SGX compliance: No public announcement shall be made until the issuer’s formal release via SGXNet; any media or ESG/climate commentary remains limited to previously published information
PDPA and data handling: No PDPA personal data (including NRIC, DOB, home address, personal emails) will be shared; any KYC will be conducted via external institutions and generic form labels [NRIC], [DOB], [Address] are placeholders only
Lock-up/board rights: Investor acknowledges no earn-out, coupon, or step-up features apply to this equity placement; a 90-day soft lock-up and a non-voting board observer right (subject to confidentiality and information-barrier policies) may be included in the definitive agreements
Confidentiality/exclusivity: Confidentiality, governing law, costs, and 30-day exclusivity are intended to be binding; all other provisions are indicative only and subject to contract
Governing law and dispute resolution: Singapore law governs; any dispute arising from the binding sections shall be referred to SIAC arbitration, seat Singapore
Notices (role mailboxes only): legal@auroragrid.example.sg; dealteam@orchidreef.example.sg; no personal emails, phone numbers, or account details (e.g., “Account No. 123-456-XYZ”) are to be used in correspondence
